tools.name: credentials.getProgrammaticAccessCredentials
tools.description: Request programmatic credentials to use with FinSpace SDK.

tools.name: datasets.createChangeset
tools.description: Creates a new Changeset in a FinSpace Dataset.

tools.name: datasets.createDataView
tools.description: Creates a Dataview for a Dataset.

tools.name: datasets.getChangeset
tools.description: Get information about a Changeset.

tools.name: datasets.getDataView
tools.description: Gets information about a Dataview.

tools.name: datasets.getExternalDataViewAccessDetails
tools.description:
Returns the credentials to access the external Dataview from an S3 location. To call this API:

  • You must retrieve the programmatic credentials.

  • You must be a member of a FinSpace user group, where the dataset that you want to access has Read Dataset Data permissions.

tools.name: datasets.listChangesets
tools.description: Lists the FinSpace Changesets for a Dataset.

tools.name: datasets.listDataViews
tools.description: Lists all available Dataviews for a Dataset.

tools.name: datasets.updateChangeset
tools.description: Updates a FinSpace Changeset.

tools.name: datasetsv2.createDataset
tools.description: Creates a new FinSpace Dataset.

tools.name: datasetsv2.deleteDataset
tools.description: Deletes a FinSpace Dataset.

tools.name: datasetsv2.getDataset
tools.description: Returns information about a Dataset.

tools.name: datasetsv2.listDatasets
tools.description: Lists all of the active Datasets that a user has access to.

tools.name: datasetsv2.updateDataset
tools.description: Updates a FinSpace Dataset.

tools.name: permissionGroup.associateUserToPermissionGroup
tools.description: Adds a user account to a permission group to grant permissions for actions a user can perform in FinSpace.

tools.name: permissionGroup.createPermissionGroup
tools.description: Creates a group of permissions for various actions that a user can perform in FinSpace.

tools.name: permissionGroup.deletePermissionGroup
tools.description: Deletes a permission group. This action is irreversible.

tools.name: permissionGroup.disassociateUserFromPermissionGroup
tools.description: Removes a user account from a permission group.

tools.name: permissionGroup.getPermissionGroup
tools.description: Retrieves the details of a specific permission group.

tools.name: permissionGroup.listUsersByPermissionGroup
tools.description: Lists details of all the users in a specific permission group.

tools.name: permissionGroup.updatePermissionGroup
tools.description: Modifies the details of a permission group. You cannot modify a permissionGroupID.

tools.name: permissionGroupMaxResults.listPermissionGroups
tools.description: Lists all available permission groups in FinSpace.

tools.name: user.createUser
tools.description: Creates a new user in FinSpace.

tools.name: user.disableUser
tools.description: Denies access to the FinSpace web application and API for the specified user.

tools.name: user.enableUser
tools.description: Allows the specified user to access the FinSpace web application and API.

tools.name: user.getUser
tools.description: Retrieves details for a specific user.

tools.name: user.listPermissionGroupsByUser
tools.description: Lists all the permission groups that are associated with a specific user account.

tools.name: user.resetUserPassword
tools.description: Resets the password for a specified user ID and generates a temporary one. Only a superuser can reset password for other users. Resetting the password immediately invalidates the previous password associated with the user.

tools.name: user.updateUser
tools.description: Modifies the details of the specified user account. You cannot update the userId for a user.

tools.name: userMaxResults.listUsers
tools.description: Lists all available user accounts in FinSpace.

tools.name: workingLocationV1.getWorkingLocation
tools.description: A temporary Amazon S3 location, where you can copy your files from a source location to stage or use as a scratch space in FinSpace notebook.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
